_readme: Per-project manual edits that WIN over synced/inferred fields and survive re-sync. Key = project slug. Live fields (last commit, deploy state, open PRs) are NOT set here so they stay auto-fresh. Set hidden:true to drop a card.

ignite-traders.name: Ignite Traders
ignite-traders.summary: Protective wear & safety supply storefront for pharmaceutical production units

onnorokom-erp.name: Onnorokom ERP
onnorokom-erp.summary: Enterprise resource planning platform for Onnorokom, shipped to production

onnorokom-hris.name: Onnorokom HRIS
onnorokom-hris.summary: HR information system — employee, attendance and HR operations management

udvash-unmesh-e-commerce.name: Udvash–Unmesh E-Commerce
udvash-unmesh-e-commerce.summary: TypeScript e-commerce storefront for Udvash–Unmesh, with Google + Facebook login

udvash-unmesh-student-portal.name: Udvash–Unmesh Design System
udvash-unmesh-student-portal.summary: Next.js 16 + Tailwind v4 design system built 1:1 from the Figma source

udvash-ds-storybook.name: Udvash Design System — Storybook
udvash-ds-storybook.summary: Storybook-hosted UI component library for the Udvash–Unmesh design system

bangla-zoom.name: Bangla Zoom
bangla-zoom.summary: Wireframe prototype for a Bangla-localized Zoom-style video conferencing app
